{
  "executive_summary": "Zero-downtime migration of the Order Management domain from MongoDB to PostgreSQL using a phased Strangler Fig approach with dual-write, shadow-read verification, and incremental cutover. The architecture introduces a Data Access Abstraction Layer (DAAL) to decouple application code from storage, a Change Data Capture (CDC) pipeline for backfill and ongoing sync, and a verification harness to guarantee data consistency before cutover.
